top_signals.title: Shipping Companies Turn Down US-Guided Military Transit Through Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Shipping companies are avoiding using a U.S. military-guided transit scheme through the Strait of Hormuz after a wave of Iranian attacks on vessels sparked safety concerns, seven maritime security and shipping industry sources said.For decades…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine to Protect Ports, Exports After Recent Russian Attacks
top_signals.summary: Ukraine will do everything possible to protect its seaports and guarantee grain exports at no less than last season's level,its deputy economy minister, Taras Vysotskiy, told Reuters on Wednesday.Russia has sharply stepped up attacks in recent…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump suspends teleprompter operator over Kalshi bets allegations, White House says
top_signals.summary: Kalshi retained most of the profits, which were more than $90,000, from the trades made on public statements by President Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
